title: 8 Herbal Teas For Nipple Pain During Breastfeeding
description: Echinacea purpurea teas contains active constituents such as alkylamides, caffeic acid, chicoric acid, and volatile oils. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce swelling and discomfort in the breast. The flavonoids and phenolic acids in Echinacea purpurea tea also have antioxidant properties, which can help soothe and calm the breast tissue. The anti-inflammatory action of Echinacea purpurea tea may also help alleviate nipple pain caused by breastfeeding...
